title: Unraveling the Tower of Babel: Archaeological Evidence Points to Ancient Babylon
description: The biblical story of the Tower of Babel may have a historical basis in the ancient city of Babylon. Archaeological findings suggest that the Etemenanki ziggurat, a significant religious structure, could have inspired the tower described in the Book of Genesis. The discovery of the Tower of Babylon Stele has provided valuable insights into the ziggurat's appearance and purpose.

title: Research Finds Motion Sickness Is Ancient, Not Modern
description: New historical research has found that early stagecoach passengers were as concerned with motion sickness as they were with the risk of being robbed

title: India, Israel Are Ancient Civilisations On Path Of National Revival: Ambassador Reuven Azar
description: (MENAFN - IANS) New Delhi, June 9 (IANS) The Israeli Ambassador to India, during the Israel National Day celebration in New Delhi, said that India and Israel are both ancient civilisations on a path ...

title: Ancient squirrel droppings reveal "remarkable" details about Arctic's history
description: Ancient squirrel droppings dating back up to 700,000 years have revealed new insights into the Arctic’s past. Scientists found the preserved dung contained DNA from plants, insects and animals including mammoths and wolves, offering a snapshot of a long-lost ecosystem. The study suggests the samples act as a natural archive, helping researchers better understand evolution and climate change over time. Credit: The Hakai Institute

title: UPSC daily subject quiz | History and Culture (Week 157) : Ancient India and historical personalities — think you can master these MCQs?
description: UPSC Prelims History MCQs: From ancient India's scientific traditions to the title of Vatapikonda and the significance of Kanyakubja, attempt today’s History & Culture quiz to test your UPSC preparation.
